Bass Pro Shops eGift Card
Lure your outdoor enthusiast to their perfect gift with the Bass Pro Shops eGift Card. The Great Outdoor Store is always just right for camping, hunting and fishing enthusiasts who know what they're looking to take on their next great trip. Let them catch what they really want with the Bass Pro Shops eGift Card.
This card can only be used in Canada. It can take up to 48 hours from the time of purchase to review and process your order. Please visit our eGift FAQs for further info.
About Bass Pro Shops
As the leading national retailer of outdoor gear since 1972, Bass Pro Shops has everything for the fishing, hunting, boating, archery and camping enthusiast, from boats and ATV's to waders, boots, shoes and clothing.
For fishing trips, give the gift of lures, rods and tackle. Hunters will find every accessory from decoys and game calls to rifles and crossbows, plus storage cases, gun safes, ammunition, sights, scopes and eye and ear protection. Bass Pro is also the place to look for accessories, including holsters, target and hunting specific clothing, while boaters know Bass Pro has everything from boats and ATV's to waders, boots, shoes.

Redeem a Bass Pro Shops eGift Card
This Bass Pro Shops eGift Card can be redeemed online on their Canadian website, or in-store at participating Bass Pro Shops locations in Canada.
In-Store Redemption
To redeem this eGift, print it out at home first, or display it on your smartphone, then show it to the cashier or sales associate when paying for your purchase, ensuring that the card number and PIN code (if required) are clearly visible.
Online Redemption
Enter the card number and PIN code (if required) during online check-out on basspro.com

87dae84c-a579-4fdb-b6ac-b8ada8c855a4.instructions: 1. Go to https://central.bitdefender.com and sign in to your Bitdefender Central account. 2. If you don’t have any active subscriptions in your Bitdefender Central account, as soon as you sign in you will be prompted to either activate your new subscription or to buy Bitdefender. Click ACTIVATE YOUR SUBSCRIPTION. If another subscription is already active in your Central account, access the My Subscriptions panel located on the left side of the page. Next, click + Activate with code. 3. Enter the new activation code you received via email or from the retailer. If you bought Bitdefender directly from the Bitdefender website, enter the activation code found in the confirmation email you received after your purchase. This code can be located beneath the section that reads “Want to use your activation code instead?” 4. Click ACTIVATE to continue. 5. Choose how you would like to use the code, and then press the CONFIRM ACTIVATION button.For instance, you can choose to add a separate subscription or to extend the current one. The latter option is only available if one of your current subscriptions is identical to the new one you are trying to add. 6. The subscription is now active in your Bitdefender Central account!

55202122-090f-4380-8e70-a78f13c0e4a3.name: Bloom & Wild
55202122-090f-4380-8e70-a78f13c0e4a3.description: As the UK’s most-loved online florist caring wildly is at the heart of Bloom & Wild. It’s in the soul of their people. That’s why their letterbox packaging is 100% recyclable. Why they offset their carbon emissions. Why they send zero waste to landfill from their warehouses. Why they treat every order like their own - with all the care in the world. Bloom & Wild exists to celebrate the little things we all do for each other every day. Not just on the big occasions. With them you can be there for the highs. Step up for the lows. Get someone out of a rut. Remember a precious memory. Find the courage to say sorry. Or silly ways to make them smile. After all, unexpected flowers are the best kind. With some companies, care is often packaged up as something cheesy and overly sentimental. But with Bloom & Wild, it goes beyond the clichés, the token gestures, the roses. To them, caring wildly is as thoughtful and beautiful as it is strong and empowering. So whether you’re thanking a friend who moonlights as your unpaid life coach or celebrating a sister who’s really more like a mum. Don’t just send flowers, care wildly.Please note that some gift cards cannot be combined with other gift car
55202122-090f-4380-8e70-a78f13c0e4a3.instructions:
1. The first redemption of a Gift Card cannot be used in conjunction with any other credit or discount. Gift cards cannot be combined with other gift cards, or other discount codes.
2. Gift Cards cannot be redeemed against multiple items in the first transaction, or additional shipping charges (where free delivery is unavailable).
3. Our Gift Cards must be redeemed on our Website, as full or part payment for products from our Website.
4. If there is any Gift Card balance outstanding upon redemption, such balance will remain as a credit balance in the Gift Card recipient’s Bloom & Wild account for 730 days.
5. Gift Cards cannot be exchanged for cash.
6. Where products purchased online with a Gift Card are returned, any monies owing will be refunded by way of the relevant amount of credit added to the Gift Card recipient’s account at Bloom & Wild.
7. Bloom & Wild is not responsible if a Gift Card is lost, stolen, destroyed or used without permission and no replacement will be provided in these circumstances.
8. No refunds will be processed in respect of the purchase of Gift Cards.

The herbs have been chopped, fresh vegetables have been washed, the brick oven is glowing, sauces are simmering on the stove, bread is baking, and the grill is flickering with heat. You can easily pay on your favorite entertainment or gaming sites anonymously today!

6bc660b1-e326-4b08-aeff-afcecc96a65e.name: CDC Foundation
6bc660b1-e326-4b08-aeff-afcecc96a65e.description: The CDC Foundation is an independent nonprofit and the sole entity created by Congress to mobilize philanthropic and private-sector resources to support the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention's critical health protection work.We are a catalyst for unleashing the power of collaboration between CDC and philanthropies, private entities and individuals to protect the health, safety and security of America and the world.By aligning diverse interests and resources and leveraging all parties' strengths, our focused collaborations with private and philanthropic partners help create greater impact than any one entity can alone. Your support saves and improves lives-right now and in the future.We have launched approximately 1,000 health protection programs and raised more than $740 million to support CDC's work over the past two decades. To keep people healthy, safe and secure, we managed over 300 CDC-led programs in the United States and in 130 countries.Visit cdcfoundation.org to learn more.

2. **Add Items to Cart**: Shop for your favorite products and add them to your shopping cart (for online purchases).
3. **Checkout**: Proceed to the checkout page.
4. **Enter Gift Card Information**: When prompted, enter your City Market Gift Card number and PIN to apply the balance to your order.
5. **Complete Your Purchase**: Confirm your purchase and enjoy your shopping!**Usage Limitations**: The City Market Gift Card cannot be used to purchase subscriptions or services. Be sure to check for any applicable terms at the time of your purchase.

55e3d68d-b54c-491f-b061-cb12de944b66.description: Clean Water Fund's mission is to develop strong grassroots environmental leadership and to bring together diverse constituencies to work cooperatively for changes that improve their lives, focused on health, consumer, environmental and community problems.Based in Washington, DC, Clean Water Fund operates locally staffed environmental and health protection programs serving communities in more than 15 states.Clean Water Fund's programs build on and complement those of Clean Water Action, a one million member national organization which has helped develop, pass, strengthen and defend the nation's major water and toxics laws such as the Clean Water Act, Safe Drinking Water Act, Superfund and others, including their state-level counterparts.Visit cleanwaterfund.org to learn more.

621d73bc-699d-4552-b01c-3945a5597fcb.name: dots.eco - Buy 10 sqft of Land for Nature Reserves
621d73bc-699d-4552-b01c-3945a5597fcb.description: Purchasing and protecting land for wildlife means safeguarding entire chunks of an ecosystem, instead of focusing on one species. This is required so that the selected ecosystems can maintain their function and role in regulating climate and biodiversity. Our partners work in key areas around the world that are home to thousands of unique and irreplaceable species and perform important crucial roles in global climate regulation.We partner with trusted organizations like Fundación Jocotoco and Rainforest Trust. Our partners manage funds to purchase land for wildlife and designating that land a legally protected area. This is the first step on the road to conservation and local sustainable development. Scientific committees are involved to select habitats, and once this has been decided, funds are used to buy land for local conservation projects and push for their protection with local governments.

b6c2d4da-da11-4c14-abd9-5b0845be199c.name: Dots.eco - Buy Land for Nature
b6c2d4da-da11-4c14-abd9-5b0845be199c.description: Purchasing and protecting land for wildlife means safeguarding entire chunks of an ecosystem, instead of focusing on one species. This is required so that the selected ecosystems can maintain their function and role in regulating climate and biodiversity. Scientific committees are involved to select habitats, and once this has been decided, funds are used to buy land for local conservation projects and push for their protection with local governments.

5b3e0356-36c7-4f14-a3c7-9ae331620819.name: dots.eco - Clean 1 lb of Ocean Plastic
5b3e0356-36c7-4f14-a3c7-9ae331620819.description: Plastic can take hundreds of years to degrade. Often, they get smaller and smaller until they become microplastics, which are now everywhere. It is very harmful to marine life, contaminates our food, and pollutes our oceans.There are currently an estimated 75-199 million tons of plastics in our oceans. That’s why we partnered with trusted and certified organizations like Plastic Fischer, Plastic Bank, Oceans Integrity, See Turtles, and others to help clean the ocean and prevent more plastic from reaching open waters.Our partners work with local river and coastal communities, giving them incentives or hiring them to help collect plastic or build swimming barriers. Plastic is then sorted and recycled. Our partners' efforts cover inland collection to prevent plastics from reaching ocean-bound rivers, coastal beaches, and river cleanups, as well as ocean clean up efforts.

ca7c132d-769d-40d0-927b-2443787d255e.name: Dots.eco - Feed Stray Dogs
ca7c132d-769d-40d0-927b-2443787d255e.description: Dogs have been human’s closest companions since ages. Every stray dog deserves to be taken good care of with food and shelter. We need to build a strong link with nature and this starts with animals. Let’s show them our respect.Location: India
ca7c132d-769d-40d0-927b-2443787d255e.instructions: Impact links to be accepted via allcolibri redemption page https://get.allcolibri.com/

a9a7dc42-0b87-40b9-ae85-f5bd75eaf788.name: dots.eco - Fighting Wildfires
a9a7dc42-0b87-40b9-ae85-f5bd75eaf788.description:
Restoring wildfire-affected habitats and managing forests are crucial for biodiversity, climate stability, and ecosystem services. Replanting native species, stabilizing soil, and reviving habitats prevent erosion, support wildlife, and restore carbon storage. Forest management, like controlled burns and thinning, reduces fuel loads, lowers fire risks, and promotes resilience. Healthy forests combat climate change, protect ecosystems, and sustain livelihoods, ensuring long-term environmental and societal benefits.
We partner with organizations like Eden: People + Planet, Vital Ground, AirSeed, and Asociación ProPurús to restore habitats affected by wildfires. Using native and fire-resilient species, they work with local communities, authorities, and scientists to perform forest management, build fire barriers, and implement strategies to help ecosystems withstand the increasing frequency and intensity of wildfires caused by climate change. They also provide training and operational support to restore land and help communities rebuild sustainable livelihoods.

065497ad-11ad-4afa-a3ae-098cdaf4c6d4.name: dots.eco - Offset 10 kg of Carbon Emissions
065497ad-11ad-4afa-a3ae-098cdaf4c6d4.description:
CO2 is a greenhouse gas that is produced mainly by burning fossil fuels. It is the main cause of climate change.Carbon credits allow people and organizations to compensate for their greenhouse gas emissions they can’t avoid, by funding projects that reduce emissions somewhere else.
We buy certified carbon credits through Carbon Trade Exchange, a partner to the United Nations Clean Development Mechanism registry.

be15ed3e-888f-422e-91df-33fe2e7ad1ab.name: dots.eco - Plant a Tree Where Needed the Most
be15ed3e-888f-422e-91df-33fe2e7ad1ab.description:
Trees produce the air we breathe, filter the water we drink, provide habitats for the pollinators responsible for providing us with food, and mitigate the effect of heat waves by providing shade to a wide variety of landscapes. They take in CO2 from the air and use it to grow while converting it into breathable air (a.k.a. oxygen). Forests have absorbed a net average of 7.6 billion tons of CO2 yearly between 2001 and 2019 alone!Our partners plant trees where needed the most. They work in more than 40 countries and focus on the most important ecosystems. These areas are critical for fighting climate change and lowering carbon levels. This is hard work. They need to clear the land, nurse the saplings, transplant them from the nursery to the planting grounds, and monitor them as they grow to evaluate survival.
We partner with trusted and certified organizations like Arbor Day Foundation, Eden Reforestation Projects, and One Tree Planted.

85dcc43d-a104-411c-a32e-67af376654f2.name: dots.eco - Protect 10 sqft of Wildlife Habitat
85dcc43d-a104-411c-a32e-67af376654f2.description: Protecting wildlife habitats means setting apart and protecting entire chunks of an ecosystem, instead of focusing on one species. This is required so that the selected ecosystems can maintain their function and role in regulating climate and biodiversity. Our partners work in key areas around the world that are home to thousands of unique and irreplaceable species. These areas perform crucial roles in global climate regulation, like the Amazon Forest, the Atlantic Forest, Tundras, and more.We partner with trusted organizations like Rainforest Trust, WeForest, Asociaciòn ProPurùs, Fundación Jocotoco, Snow Leopard Trust and David Shepherd Wildlife Foundation. Our partners are spread across a chain of stages to protect wildlife habitats: designating land a protected area, supporting infrastructure installation to ensure protection, restoring degraded landscapes, and managing reserves and protected area activities. Our partners work with local communities, authorities, and the scientific community to maintain and ensure the protection status, offering training and operational support to local communities in not only restoring or maintaining a protected area, but also developing sustai

a7f51e18-1215-4cc7-8a57-9091dd899bd5.name: dots.eco - Protect 10 sqm of Marine Habitat
a7f51e18-1215-4cc7-8a57-9091dd899bd5.description: Protecting marine areas is a key effort in ocean conservation. The areas we protect are designated Marine Protected Areas (MPAs) due to their ecological importance to maintaining marine ecosystems. We enable protection for areas that are crucial in maintaining aquatic ecosystems healthy, like reproductive and nursery grounds for important marine species, as well as biodiversity hotspots that sustain ecosystem function. We partner with trusted organizations like Coral Reef Alliance. Our partners work to ensure that Marine Protected Areas (MPA) have their legal protection status enforced by supporting the necessary infrastructure to prevent illegal and destructive activities. They work with local communities to patrol the marine areas, checking for illegal sewage dumping which helps keeping the water clean, establish sustainable fishing practices and management programs when necessary, and organizing boat patrols to ensure the perimeter of the MPAs are not violated.

d02c0599-3148-44ff-93a1-db41bb25e076.name: Dots.eco - Protect Wildlife Habitat
d02c0599-3148-44ff-93a1-db41bb25e076.description: Protecting wildlife habitats means setting apart and protecting entire chunks of an ecosystem, instead of focusing on one species. This is required so that the selected ecosystems can maintain their function and role in regulating climate and biodiversity. Our partners are spread across a chain of stages to protect wildlife habitats: designating land a protected area, supporting infrastructure installation to ensure protection, restoring degraded landscapes, and managing reserves and protected area activities. Our partners work with local communities, authorities, and the scientific community to maintain and ensure the protection status, offering training and operational support to local communities in not only restoring or maintaining a protected area, but also developing sustai

d6cdca76-f199-4dfb-8d36-11cebe889fca.name: dots.eco - Restore 1 Fragment of Coral Reef
d6cdca76-f199-4dfb-8d36-11cebe889fca.description: Corals are colonies of millions of tiny little animals. They are cousins of jellyfish and anemones, and are home to a quarter of all marine species! They provide food for millions of people, attract a lot of tourism and act as barriers protecting shorelines from storms.We partner with trusted organizations like Coral Guardian and Biorock Indonesia to restore coral reefs that have been damaged or degraded due to human activities. Our partners grow living corals in a nursery and transplant them to the degraded reef when the fragments reach a viable size. Then, they monitor the growth and health of the transplanted colonies to ensure their survival.

5337df97-70db-4515-a196-ff4d5e4604c1.name: dots.eco - Restore Kelp Forests
5337df97-70db-4515-a196-ff4d5e4604c1.description: Kelp forests are vital for climate resilience and ecosystem health. They absorb carbon dioxide, act as natural carbon sinks, and support marine biodiversity, enhancing ecosystem stability. By buffering ocean acidification and reducing coastal erosion, they protect shorelines and marine life. These forests also serve as critical habitats for numerous species and contribute to global carbon cycles. Their preservation and restoration are essential to combating climate change, sustaining biodiversity, and protecting coastal environments.We partner with trusted entities like Veritree to restore kelp forests that have been damaged or degraded. Our partners attach juvenile kelp to long lines, transplant them and fix them in the field, then care and monitor their development to ensure recovery of the local kelp beds.

2a32a7da-ea56-4bbf-8fcb-1a2f670c0992.name: dots.eco - Save a Sea Turtle Hatchling
2a32a7da-ea56-4bbf-8fcb-1a2f670c0992.description:
Sea turtles have a key role in their ecosystem. We need them for keeping a healthy balance in our oceans and beaches. They control the populations of several organisms by eating them, but are also food for many key ocean and coastal predators, placing them in a key spot inside wild food webs.Their shells are home to a myriad of organisms, and some sea turtle species carry entire communities on their backs, functioning as a dispersing mechanism for many species.We partner with trusted and certified organizations like See Turtles, Love the Oceans, and Conservation des Espèces Marine to help protect these beautiful and important animals.
Our partners work at key sites around the world, helping protect important nesting beaches, promote responsible tourism, end the tortoiseshell trade, get plastic out of turtle habitats, and educate people about these species.

483af553-d071-40e4-b5b2-00f952f9dc61.name: dots.eco - Support Rescued Pets
483af553-d071-40e4-b5b2-00f952f9dc61.description: Providing vulnerable pets a place to stay is a crucial way to address the problems of mistreatment, overpopulation, and abandonment. Animal shelters address urgent welfare issues and offer long-term solutions through adoption, community involvement, and education. Our partners work tirelessly with the goal to provide every pet with compassionate care, from a warm bed to essential medical treatment, and pave the way for animals with healthier futures.Supporting pet shelters and rescued organization that adhere to the strictest guidelines for animal care is the core objective of our work. By partnering with organizations like Mayhew, we ensure that these shelters serve as centers for community education and outreach in addition to being refuges, encouraging sustainable practices and ethical pet ownership.

4644afbb-37a0-408b-89a2-4ee54cc644e6.description: Discover the perfect gift for any occasion with the Gerbes Gift Card! 4644afbb-37a0-408b-89a2-4ee54cc644e6.instructions: To redeem your Gerbes Gift Card, simply follow these easy steps: 1. Visit any participating Gerbes location or shop online at gerbes.com. 2. Everything everyone needs to eat well and live better: that’s the beauty of the Giant Eagle gift card.

788fde7e-f0d1-4c40-b9a8-c47cb65ba727.description: The Global Hotel Card Powered by Expedia is the premier gift card for hotels, resorts, vacation rentals and private homes worldwide. Choose from over 500,000 places to stay, near or far, including all major hotel brands, resorts, and bed & breakfasts around the world as well as vacation rentals, private homes, villas, alternate accommodations and more.We offer over 350 major hotel brands including Marriott, Accor, Intercontinental, Hyatt, Hilton and more. If you prefer something more private for a getaway with family, friends or loved ones, our website includes over 150,000 vacation rentals and private homes worldwide. Accommodation availability, pricing and booking confirmation are provided by the Expedia Affiliate Network, a division of Expedia, Inc., one of the world’s largest travel companies.See all the possibilities and book your Hotel or Vacation Rental stay at www.globalhotelcard.com, Powered by Expedia.
788fde7e-f0d1-4c40-b9a8-c47cb65ba727.instructions: •Search our accommodations database in the currency of your gift card and book your stay at www.globalhotelcard.com.•Apply the 19-digit Gift Card Code and 4-digit Pin value as full or partial payment of the accommodation reservation. You may combine up to four gift cards per reservation. Simply apply the value of your gift card for full or partial payment of the accommodation reservation. The balance, if necessary, may be paid with a major credit card.•Your reservations will be confirmed by email directly from Global Hotel Card and the accommodations’ central reservation system. At check-in simply present your identification for the pre-paid reservation. A major credit card will be required by the accommodation for charges other than the pre-paid room and tax.

64426d9d-9f66-4c9c-9668-3f1b3c809056.name: Golf Town
64426d9d-9f66-4c9c-9668-3f1b3c809056.description:
Golf Town eGift CardsKeep the golfer in your life on par with a Golf Town eGift Card. The perfect gift for everything golf, from accessories and bags, to gloves, clothing, balls, rangefinders, carts and clubs. With the Golf Town eGift Card, they'll get exactly what they want, every time.
This card can only be used in Canada. It can take up to 48 hours from the time of purchase to review and process your order. Please visit our eGift FAQs for further info.About Golf TownGolf Town is the ultimate destination for those who love golf, where they'll find everything they need to play the game they love. Featuring a massive selection of clubs, shoes, apparel, rangefinders, balls, bags, carts and skill-refining accessories from top brands, if it's golf related, then Golf Town has it. Their Fair-Way promise assures customers they'll get the gear they want at the best price, where you can try out anything in the store before buying it, from hitting in the bays, to putting on the greens, to trying on the pants. Plus, Golf Town offers no-hassle returns and a trade-in, trade-up program. At Canada's golf superstore, they can also ask the certified Master Club Fitters to help find the best clubs
64426d9d-9f66-4c9c-9668-3f1b3c809056.instructions:
Redeem a Golf Town eGift
This Golf Town eGift Card is redeemable at participating Golf Town locations in Canada, or it can be used online at golftown.com. Each time you use this eGift, the amount of your purchase will be deducted from the remaining balance until it reaches zero, with any excess purchase price still payable using another method of payment at the time of purchase.
In-Store Redemption
To redeem this eGift Card in-store, print it out at home first, or display it on your smartphone, then show it to the cashier or sales associate when paying for your purchases, ensuring that the card number and PIN code (if required) are clearly visible.
Online Redemption
This eGift Card can be used to shop online at golftwon.com. During online check-out, enter the card number and PIN code (if required), making sure there are no spaces in the card number or PIN code when you type them in, then apply the card to your purchase.

71518ae5-5aca-4dc0-908e-bfea2d3540a8.name: Haggen
71518ae5-5aca-4dc0-908e-bfea2d3540a8.description:
The Haggen Gift Card is your gateway to delightful grocery shopping in the United States, offering a seamless experience for anyone looking to enjoy fresh and high-quality produce, gourmet items, and everyday essentials. Key features include:
- **Flexibility**: Use it to buy groceries at any Haggen store nationwide, perfect for stocking up on your favorites.
- **Variety**: Choose from a vast selection of items, including organic and locally sourced products, ensuring that you always find exactly what you need.
- **No Expiration**: Enjoy peace of mind knowing that your Haggen gift card has no expiration date, allowing you to redeem it whenever suits you best.
This gift card is a great benefit for friends and family who love to cook or simply enjoy quality food shopping. Gift it or use it for yourself and experience the joy of shopping at Haggen!
71518ae5-5aca-4dc0-908e-bfea2d3540a8.instructions:
Redeeming your Haggen Gift Card is simple! Follow these steps to make the most of your card:
1. **Visit a Haggen store**: Go to any participating Haggen location across the United States.
2. **Choose your items**: Pick out your groceries and other products you wish to purchase.
3. **Present your gift card at checkout**: Let the cashier know you have a gift card to redeem. They will scan it for you.
4. **Complete your transaction**: Your total will be deducted from the gift card balance. If your purchase exceeds the card balance, you can pay the remaining amount with another payment method.**Usage Limitations**: Please note that the Haggen Gift Card cannot be used towards the purchase of alcoholic beverages or tobacco products. Always check with the cashier about any specific limitations when redeeming.

Enjoy the ultimate convenience of online shopping and let your loved ones select their favorite pieces from an extensive collection of apparel made from soft, durable fabrics with a focus on comfort and style.**Key Features:**

ab3b9f2d-369e-4de9-85c8-1900e6a6b026.instructions:

1. **Visit the Website:** Go to the official Hanna Andersson website.
2. **Shop:** Browse through the collections and add your favorite items to your shopping cart.
3. **Checkout:** Once you are ready to purchase, click on the shopping cart icon to proceed to checkout.
4. **Enter Gift Card Information:** On the payment page, select "Gift Card" as your payment method and enter the gift card number and PIN when prompted.
5. **Complete Purchase:** Review your order and complete the purchase to enjoy your new clothes!**Usage Limitations:**
- The gift card cannot be used for subscriptions or bulk orders.

About KernelsIn 1983 Kernels Popcorn opened its first, now flagship, store in the Toronto Eaton Centre, with a vow to change the popcorn world forever. Rakuten Kobo eGift Card
Make a book lover's day with the Rakuten Kobo eGift Card for Canada, the perfect choice for the avid reader in your life. Rakuten Kobo has access to millions of the world's best books - including kids' content, magazines and more - anywhere, on any device.
This card can only be used in Canada. It can take up to 48 hours from the time of purchase to review and process your order. Please visit our eGift FAQs for further info.
About Rakuten Kobo
Kobo delivers the best digital reading experience, offering one of the world's largest catalogues, with millions of titles, award-winning eReaders and top-ranking apps, where millions of users all over the globe read in dozens of languages. Originally founded in 2009, the popularity of Rakuten Kobo's eReading services made it one of the fastest-growing companies in the world. The Toronto-born company is now owned by the eCommerce company Rakuten Inc. a9128830-7edc-4eae-ad90-bb3c79c99f25.name: Laithwaite's Wine
a9128830-7edc-4eae-ad90-bb3c79c99f25.description: Wine always makes a lovely gift! And who better to choose from than Laithwaite’s, the UK's no.1 home delivery wine merchant. Ever since founder Tony Laithwaite drove a van to Bordeaux in 1969, this family-owned firm have been going direct to find those delicious gems you won’t find on the big retailers’ shelves. Over nearly 50 years, they’ve built up an award-winning range of 1,400 different wines, beers, spirits and Champagne. Every bottle comes with a 100% money back guarantee – and their customer service is second to none, with higher scores than any other wine merchant, even beating Amazon and John Lewis too.

1343c793-64f7-4646-a5a5-6cd20534c28a.description: Inside Disney’s Animal Kingdom®, Yak & Yeti is a restaurant and quick-service eatery featuring delicious Pan-Asian cuisine. Situated at the base of Mt. Everest in the small town of Anandapur, Yak & Yeti offers great food and good-spirited family fun. Whether you dine in the Yak & Yeti Restaurant or grab something fast from the quick-service selections, you’ll indulge in some of Asia’s most tasty offerings. www.yakandyetirestaurant.com

2a4dae23-0366-40c9-b129-d1f6cb9b8424.name: Landry's - Landry's Seafood House
2a4dae23-0366-40c9-b129-d1f6cb9b8424.description: Indulge in a culinary journey with the Landry's Seafood House gift card! Perfect for seafood lovers, this card offers access to a fantastic menu featuring the freshest catches and seafood delicacies. Redeemable across numerous Landry's Seafood House locations in the United States, it’s an ideal gift for anyone who enjoys dining in style. Enjoy delectable dishes in a vibrant atmosphere without fussing over payment. Plus, it’s a great choice for both casual dinners and special occasions. Just a heads up – this gift card does not expire!
2a4dae23-0366-40c9-b129-d1f6cb9b8424.instructions: Redeeming your Landry's Seafood House gift card is simple! Just follow these steps: 1. Visit any Landry's Seafood House location in the United States. 2. Present your gift card to your server before placing your order. 3. The balance on the card will be deducted from your total purchase. Note: This gift card cannot be used for online orders or takeout services, and it’s not valid for subscription services.

b810f745-a406-4cba-9e8d-b0009af2f744.name: Landry's - Rainforest Cafe
b810f745-a406-4cba-9e8d-b0009af2f744.description: Part adventure, part restaurant, and wholly entertaining. The Rainforest Cafe is A WILD PLACE TO EAT® and exciting thrill for all ages. Wild times await in a decorative jungle with animatronics and a menu of delicious American and tropical fare. Visitors can also hover over “Wild Bunch” attire and hundreds of private-label souvenirs at the Rainforest Cafe Retail Village, while Tracy the Talking Tree speaks up every 30 seconds with an earth-friendly message.
b810f745-a406-4cba-9e8d-b0009af2f744.instructions: Redemption InstructionsPlease print this eGift card that contains your gift card number and present it at the time of payment. For mobile redemption, the server will hand key the gift card number or scan the barcode off the mobile device. You will be asked to write the eGift card number on your guest check if the option to scan is not available. The server will verify the eGift card number on your phone and check the balance.

d16470d7-fd28-49f4-a8da-dfe6ea7a2e5b.instructions: Redemption InstructionsEnter the PIN (a 13-digit alphanumeric code) you received directly after the purchase, at the registration form www.mygiftcard.lastminute.com.Complete the form with the name and email address for the gift card's intended recipient - this could be you, or a friend or family member. d3ba63ad-cedf-4d5c-86f6-19d9d96d2c33.name: lastminute.com - Holiday Gift Card
d3ba63ad-cedf-4d5c-86f6-19d9d96d2c33.description:
With lastminute.com gift cards you have over 450 airlines and 2,5 millions stays across the world at your fingertips. We release hundreds of offers every day so you can be sure you're always travelling at the best possible prices.
lastminute.com has been accompanying travellers along their journey for over 20 years, from the moment they search a holiday to the moment they need help with any last-minute changes.
Give yourself, or someone important to you, a lastminute.com gift card: you'll only get unforgettable experiences with us.
d3ba63ad-cedf-4d5c-86f6-19d9d96d2c33.instructions:
- The Gift Card is valid for 12 months from the date of issue. The trip departure date can be after the voucher expiry date.
- The Gift Card cannot be used with any other vouchers issued by us in a promotional or refund capacity.
- The Gift Card can only be used on gift-card.lastminute.com or www.lastminute.com to book flight + hotel packages. (services which require payment to be made to a third party on arrival are excluded).
- It can be used for multiple bookings, until the full value is redeemed. If the total sum of the booking is less than the value of the Card, the remaining credit can be used for a new booking. Conversely, if the amount of the booking is greater than that of the Card, you can use a valid credit or debit card to pay the outstanding amount.
- The Gift Card cannot be sold or refunded, even in the event of theft or loss, nor can it be exchanged for money or other goods or services.
- It cannot be used to acquire post-sale services once the booking is confirmed.

dd3fee64-e9b0-4781-b8aa-065ac2f76e7a.name: Legal Sea Foods
dd3fee64-e9b0-4781-b8aa-065ac2f76e7a.description: Legal Sea Foods was born in 1950 at a local fish market in Inman Square, Cambridge.  Next door was a grocery store, known as Legal Cash Market, where customers were given “Legal Stamps” (AKAS&H green stamps) with their purchases. It’s here that the “Legal” name became synonymous with quality and freshness.  In 1968, the first Legal Sea Foods restaurant opened, where the fish was simply prepared and served on paper plates at communal picnic tables. Despite the low-key trappings, the food was second to none and word quickly spread. Early success led to further expansion; and, ultimately became today’s Boston-based Legal Sea Foods Restaurant Group Inc., boasting two growing seafood concepts: Legal Sea Foods and Legal C Bar! Maintaining its commitment to quality, freshness, and integrity behind the pier-to-plate journey, the company continues to reach for the highest standards. So, when we say, "If it isn't fresh, it isn't Legal!" we renew a commitment that has sustained the brand for over a half-century!
dd3fee64-e9b0-4781-b8aa-065ac2f76e7a.instructions:

ebba7033-b06a-45ea-9ddd-f224ce6b6022.description: Welcome to the LEGO® e-Gift card, the amazing home of LEGO building toys, gifts, stunning display sets and more for kids and adults alike. Find the perfect gift for toddlers, teens and adults for Christmas, birthdays or other occasions. We make it easy to shop for toys that will provide hours of fun and imaginative play. You’ll also find curated LEGO® sets for adults perfectly matching their interests, such as vehicles, art and design, gaming and much more!
ebba7033-b06a-45ea-9ddd-f224ce6b6022.instructions: If you would like to redeem your LEGO Gift Card or e-Gift Card online, simply add the items you would like to purchase to your shopping cart by clicking the Add to Cart button next to the items you want, then proceed to checkout. On the second page of checkout (payment page), after your order summary, there is a “Gift Card” section with fields to enter your gift card number and PIN or eGift card number and PIN.Enter your gift card number and PIN or e-gift card number and PIN and click “Apply Gift Card”. (Your gift card or e-gift card will not be applied if you do not click “Apply Gift Card” before checking out.) The page will then refresh and the amount of your gift card or e-gift card will automatically be applied to your order.If the gift card or e-gift card covers the cost of your order, we will transfer the remaining balance back to a gift card account that you can access using your gift card or e-gift card number. The next time you place an order, you can use this number again along with the PIN to receive the remaining balance on your gift card or e-gift card.If the cost of your order exceeds the amount of your gift card or e-gift card, you must pay the balance of the order using a valid payment method. We do not accept partial payments by invoice. LEGO Gift Cards and e-Gift Vouchers cannot be issued in conjunction with PayPal.

Plus, enjoy the peace of mind knowing that these cards do not expire, making them a perfect gift for any time of year. Treat someone special or indulge yourself today!

d1f1dd79-589c-4ffc-b179-5cff7a92a10c.description: Liberty is the leading destination store in London, a wonderful emporium where the latest fashions sit alongside design classics.Since 1875, Liberty has been synonymous with luxury and great design.Arthur Liberty’s intuitive vision and pioneering spirit led him to travel the world looking for individual pieces to inspire and excite his discerning clientele.Liberty is not just a name above the door, it’s Arthur Liberty’s legacy, which stands for integrity, value, quality and above all beautifully designed product.

e1cd0680-e942-49db-802e-c416d86fd54d.description: At Logan’s Roadhouse® you can come as you are, be yourself and make lifelong friends. Come on in, loosen up and toss some peanut shells on the floor at Logan’s, The Real American Roadhouse®!

2ef7c3b4-e34f-4948-b9fe-aac080ccb224.description:
**Lucky Gift Card - The Perfect Digital Gift!**
When you're looking for the ideal gift for a loved one or a treat for yourself, the Lucky Gift Card is your go-to choice! Designed for users in the United States, this digital gift card opens the door to a world of exciting possibilities.**Key Features:**
- **Versatile Use:** The Lucky Gift Card can be used across a wide range of online platforms, allowing you to shop for games, entertainment, and more.
- **Instant Delivery:** Receive your Lucky Gift Card instantly via email, making it a great last-minute gift.
- **No Expiration Date:** Enjoy the freedom to use your card whenever you want without worrying about expiration constraints.**Benefits of Using the Lucky Gift Card:**
- **Convenience:** Perfect for busy shoppers who prefer digital solutions.
- **Personalized Gifting:** Easily gift the card to friends or family, allowing them to choose exactly what they want.
- **Secure and Reliable:** Transactions are safe and straightforward, ensuring peace of mind with every purchase.With a Lucky Gift Card in hand, you have the perfect way to show someone you care while giving them the flexibility to choose their perfect gift!
2ef7c3b4-e34f-4948-b9fe-aac080ccb224.instructions:
**How to Redeem Your Lucky Gift Card**
1. **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the designated redemption website provided with your Lucky Gift Card.
2. **Create an Account or Log In:** If you don’t already have an account, create one. If you’ve got an existing one, simply log in.
3. **Find the Gift Card Redemption Section:** Look for ‘Redeem Gift Card’ or a similar option on the site.
4. **Enter Your Code:** Type in the unique code from your Lucky Gift Card.
5. **Apply and Enjoy:** Click ‘Submit’ and watch the value of the card be added to your account balance!**Usage Limitations:**
- The Lucky Gift Card is not valid for subscriptions or memberships.
- It is only redeemable within the United States.
- Ensure to use the card fully as partial refunds may not be issued.

5b8d4f47-8029-4b2c-9048-fc6a314ae438.description: Few things come close to the joy of steak and chips – cooked simply with tender, loving care. The open kitchens in many of our steakhouses are testimony to that. Whatever your preferred cut – ribeye, fillet, sirloin or perhaps a chateaubriand between two – it'll be as flavoursome and tender as our master butcher intended. Our cellar is brimming with elegant wines to match your meal, with a good selection of reds, whites, rosés and champagnes available by the glass or bottle. And on the bar you'll find a selection of quality draught and bottled beers, cocktails and other tipples.

443dece7-0901-4b01-bd49-a3e208d72c81.name: National Park Foundation
443dece7-0901-4b01-bd49-a3e208d72c81.description: Chartered by Congress in 1967, the National Park Foundation— official philanthropic partner of the National Park Service —works on behalf of America’s more than 400 national parks and their programs, safeguarding our heritage, and inspiring generations of national park enthusiasts. The National Park Foundation carries forth a legacy of support that began more than a century ago, when private citizens took action to establish and protect our treasured national parks. The Foundation fulfills its mission in partnership with the National Park Service and with countless affiliated local park Friends Groups, funding programs that promote leadership and innovation in conservation and preservation, educate youth and adults alike, encourage volunteerism, enhance the park visitor experience, and connect diverse communities to our shared heritage.Visit nationalparks.org to learn more.

b62f1530-4c39-4c05-8e1a-2318fe5fa7ff.name: Ninety Nine Restaurant

09689877-2b30-48cf-86c6-94e1ba2bb8b6.name: Nintendo eShop Canada
09689877-2b30-48cf-86c6-94e1ba2bb8b6.description: Obtenez les jeux que vous voulez, quand vous voulez avec une carte Nintendo eShop! Choisissez parmi plus de 1000 jeux à télécharger directement depuis votre console. Offrez une carte-cadeau Nintendo de à un joueur pour qu'il puisse accéder à plus de 1000 jeux à télécharger depuis Nintendo eShop directement depuis sa console Wii U ou sa console de la famille Nintendo 3DS.
09689877-2b30-48cf-86c6-94e1ba2bb8b6.instructions: • Sélectionnez Nintendo eShop dans le menu HOME pour ouvrir Nintendo eShop.• Choisissez le compte que vous voulez utiliser.• Sélectionnez Entrer le code à gauche de l'écran.• Saisissez le code de téléchargement à 16 caractères.• Certaines cartes émises par des détaillants pour le logiciel Nintendo Switch comportent à la fois un numéro de contrôle et un code de téléchargement. Assurez-vous de saisir le code de téléchargement (il commence généralement par un B, sans tirets entre les chiffres), et non le code de contrôle (il commence généralement par un S, avec des tirets entre les chiffres).• Les lettres et les symboles qui ne sont pas utilisés dans les codes prépayés (c.-à-d. O, I, Z, les virgules, les traits d'union, etc.) seront désactivés sur le clavier virtuel.• Sélectionnez OK pour confirmer. Le téléchargement du jeu commencera une fois le code confirmé.• L'icône du jeu apparaîtra dans le menu HOME, avec une ligne de statut de téléchargement. La ligne de statut disparaîtra une fois le téléchargement du jeu terminé.

889abbdf-35d7-4e7e-8cef-b213b9ec36b9.description: Give friends, relatives or even yourself a smile with a Nintendo eShop Card!A Nintendo eShop Card is the perfect gift for anyone who loves to play and wants to have fun!You can use Nintendo eShop Cards as a fast, safe and easy alternative to credit cards when purchasing games and other content on Nintendo eShop or on the official Nintendo website.Open Nintendo eShop on your Nintendo Switch console and you'll discover a world of games available for immediate purchase and download.You can use Nintendo eShop Cards to add funds to your Nintendo eShop balance in five denominations: £15, £25, £50, £75 and £100. Note that Nintendo eShop displays prices in the currency that corresponds to the country/region setting for your Nintendo Account.
889abbdf-35d7-4e7e-8cef-b213b9ec36b9.instructions:
Legal notices for Nintendo eShop prepaid code:
To use the code, you must have access to a wireless internet connection and accept the network-related terms and privacy policies. You may also be required to create or link a Nintendo Account.This code:
* can only be redeemed once at its full value, for the same currency as used to purchase the code.
* cannot be resold, exchanged, or otherwise redeemed for cash.
* 30 day window from the time of purchase for refunds (if the gift card has not been redeemed)
* will not be replaced by Nintendo or the retailer if lost, stolen or otherwise used without your permission.Please keep the confirmation for future reference.
Issued by Nintendo of Europe GmbH.

f96001ff-a06a-42e0-8990-a3b7923a7594.name: Nintendo Switch Online - 12 Months UK
f96001ff-a06a-42e0-8990-a3b7923a7594.description: The perfect gift for anyone who loves to play. Choose from over 2,000 new, classic and indie games and don’t forget that downloadable content (DLC) to power-up your play experience. Delivered directly to your Nintendo Switch, Nintendo 3DS™ family of systems or Wii U™.
f96001ff-a06a-42e0-8990-a3b7923a7594.instructions: Nintendo eShop Digital Cards are redeemable only through the Nintendo eShop on the Wii U or Nintendo 3DS family of systems. Digital Card balances can be shared across Wii U and Nintendo 3DS family of systems, but may only be used on a single Nintendo eShop account. Detailed instructions for redeeming by device: Wii U 1. If you haven’t already, set up an Internet connection to your system and make sure your device has the latest system update. 2. From the HOME Menu, select the Nintendo eShop icon. 3. Select “Balance” from the menu on the left side of the screen. 4. Tap button that says “Nintendo eShop Card.” 5. Tap the box that says, “Enter the code.” 6. Use the touch screen to enter the activation code from the Digital Card and tap “OK.” 7. Select “Add.” Nintendo 2DS/3DS/3DS XL 1. If you haven’t already, set up an Internet connection to your system and make sure your device has the latest system update. 2. From the HOME Menu, select the Nintendo eShop icon. 3. Scroll left and select “Add Funds.” 4. Select “Redeem a Nintendo eShop Card.” 5. Tap the box that says, “Enter the activation code.” 6. Use the touch screen to enter the activation code from the Digital Card and tap “OK.” 7. Tap “OK” again.

5efc69d2-440a-4b93-a0ad-4604f5187510.name: Nintendo Switch Online - 12 Months US
5efc69d2-440a-4b93-a0ad-4604f5187510.description:
You can choose between various Nintendo Switch Online membership plans:
Individual membership plans provide the service to the Nintendo Account user that purchases the membership.
Family membership plans provide the service to everyone in the purchaser's Nintendo Account family group (up to 8 people).  You can purchase multiple of the same membership plan to extend your overall membership time.  If you already belong to a family membership, you cannot purchase, redeem a download code for, or change to an individual membership.  If you already have an existing membership, you can change from an   individual membership to a family membership, or to a Nintendo Switch Online + Expansion Pack membership, for a discounted price. The discount amount is based on the number of remaining days on your existing membership, up to the full cost of the new membership. For more details, review our Information on Changing a Nintendo Switch Online Membership Plan.
5efc69d2-440a-4b93-a0ad-4604f5187510.instructions:
•  Go to cardredemption.com
•  Enter PIN
•  Get Gift card code
• Go to Nintendo eShop
• Select Nintendo eShop on the HOME Menu to launch the Nintendo eShop.
• Select the account you want to use.
• Select Nintendo Switch Online on the left side of the screen.
• Scroll down to Redeem Code and select Enter.
• Enter the 16-digit download code for the Nintendo Switch Online membership, then select OK.
• Download codes intended for use in the U.S., Canada, and Mexico cannot be used in countries in Latin America (and vice versa).
• Make sure to review and accept any required terms that appear on the screen.Any letters and symbols not used with prepaid codes (i.e. O, I, Z, commas, hyphens, etc.) will be disabled from the on-screen keyboard.
Select Confirm to redeem the code.

00206511-a099-434b-b5b7-4143268fe71e.name: Ole & Steen
00206511-a099-434b-b5b7-4143268fe71e.description: imagine the best Christmas ever, with all your nearest and dearest snug and cosy around a warm and welcoming fire, with the delicious, spicy, fruity smells of festive food and drink filling the air, as everyone enjoys the companionship of the season. The Danes have a word for it – “Hygge” [hue-gah].This year, we would love to invite you all in to our Hygge Wonderland and help you create your very own hygge moments as we welcome back our festive favourites as well as saying a jolly big ‘Hej’ to our new Christmas Brød and sweet treats which perfectly contribute to your Christmas table.

20704c09-c7e5-47f7-aaa3-53004a909e44.name: Oliver & Bonacini - Auberge du Pommier
20704c09-c7e5-47f7-aaa3-53004a909e44.description: A modern French fine dining restaurant, Auberge du Pommier exudes a quiet confidence, reflecting our commitment to culinary excellence and inspired service. Constructed around the rustic vestiges of two 1860’s woodcutters’ cottages, Auberge du Pommier combines country charm with contemporary sophistication and style. Featuring wood burning fireplaces in winter and lush, floral terraces in summer, it is a welcoming, refined retreat from the city.Restaurant gastronomique français moderne, l'Auberge du Pommier dégage une confiance tranquille, reflétant notre engagement envers l'excellence culinaire et un service inspiré. Construite autour des vestiges rustiques de deux chalets de bûcherons des années 1860, l'Auberge du Pommier allie le charme de la campagne à un raffinement et un style contemporains. Doté de poêles à bois en hiver et de terrasses luxuriantes et fleuries en été, c'est un refuge accueillant et raffiné loin de la ville.
20704c09-c7e5-47f7-aaa3-53004a909e44.instructions: Redemption is as simple as presenting the e-gift card after a meal – either in print or on a mobile phone.Il vous suffit de présenter la carte-cadeau électronique après un repas - soit sur papier soit sur un téléphone mobile.

c265da1f-cd9d-494f-a9b6-66f599beaa8c.name: Oliver & Bonacini - Bannock
c265da1f-cd9d-494f-a9b6-66f599beaa8c.description: Bannock is unapologetically Canadian, from its cozy dining room to its newly renovated bar. Taking an honest approach to food, our dishes are dynamic and playful; they feature familiar, wholesome ingredients; and, most of all, they reflect of our country’s rich regional and cultural diversity.Le Bannock est résolument canadien, depuis sa salle à manger confortable jusqu'à son bar récemment rénové. Adoptant une approche honnête de la nourriture, nos plats sont dynamiques et ludiques. Ils contiennent des ingrédients sains et familiers et, surtout, ils reflètent la riche diversité régionale et culturelle de notre pays.

2f7628b4-8789-4172-b5eb-e62972217b28.name: Oliver & Bonacini - Beaumont
2f7628b4-8789-4172-b5eb-e62972217b28.description: Beaumont Kitchen is a fashionable all-day dining lounge that balances comfort and sophistication. Our cuisine is chef-driven and rooted in quality, showcasing fresh, seasonal and local ingredients in creative and authentic ways. Inviting you to enjoy without guilt, our healthy-meets-indulgent menu excites, nourishes and satisfies.Beaumont Kitchen est un restaurant à la mode qui allie confort et raffinement, et vous propose des repas tout au long de la journée. Notre cuisine est dirigée par un chef et repose sur des produits de qualité, mettant en valeur les ingrédients frais, locaux et de saison de manière créative et authentique. Notre menu sain et gourmand, une invitation à savourer sans culpabilité, vous enthousiasmera tout en vous laissant véritablement nourri et satisfait.

de7a314b-d395-4b10-9c2e-292e78b77264.name: Oliver & Bonacini - Beauty BBQ
de7a314b-d395-4b10-9c2e-292e78b77264.description: Our team at Beauty Eats is all fired up to bring the North York ‘hood a tasty range of Detroit-style pizza, fried chicken, burgers and BBQ, along with daily smokehouse specials. Inspired by our love of comfort foods, our mouth-watering eats feature a variety of flavour-enhancing techniques — from baking our pies in deep blue steel pans (in true Motor-City fashion) to smoking our patties low and slow over live wood.------L'équipe de Beauty Eats est très enthousiaste à l'idée d'offrir aux habitants de North York une gamme savoureuse de pizzas, de poulets frits, de hamburgers et de barbecues de style Détroit, ainsi que des plats du jour au fumoir. Inspirés par notre amour des aliments réconfortants, nos plats alléchants font appel à une variété de techniques qui rehaussent la saveur - de la cuisson de nos tartes dans des moules en acier bleu profond (dans le plus pur style de la ville de Détroit) au fumage lent de nos galettes sur du bois vivant.

06e2f961-f5ea-4466-84fe-2ce2e0ee3a1d.name: Oliver & Bonacini - Biff's Bistro
06e2f961-f5ea-4466-84fe-2ce2e0ee3a1d.description: Indulge in our robust, seasonal menus, featuring traditional French bistro favourites, like steak tartare, duck confit and steak frites. Unwind with cocktails and flavourful bites in the buzzing bar après work. Or enjoy al fresco dining on our colourful street-side terrace, inspired by Parisian patios.Laissez-vous tenter par nos menus de saison consistants, qui mettent en vedette des plats de bistrot français traditionnels, comme le steak tartare, le confit de canard et le steak frites. Détendez-vous avec des cocktails et des bouchées savoureuses dans le bar animé. Ou profitez d'un repas en plein air sur notre terrasse colorée côté rue, inspirée des patios parisiens.

c6ef0575-eb0d-4796-ad7a-953ffbce2ebb.name: Oliver & Bonacini - Canoe
c6ef0575-eb0d-4796-ad7a-953ffbce2ebb.description: Connecting people to place through contemporary Canadian cuisine, Canoe crafts inspired dishes reflective of our country’s diverse landscape, history and culture. Our chefs work closely with farmers and suppliers to source the finest ingredients from across the nation. With over 20 years of culinary history, Canoe continues to challenge creative boundaries in the spirit of celebrating Canada and its distinct provinces.Nos plats inspirés de l'artisanat de Canoe reflètent le paysage, l'histoire et la culture diversifiés de notre pays, et relient les personnes au lieu par le biais de la cuisine canadienne contemporaine. Nos chefs travaillent en étroite collaboration avec les agriculteurs et les fournisseurs pour s'approvisionner en ingrédients d'excellente qualité dans tout le pays. Avec plus de 20 ans d'histoire culinaire, Canoe continue de repousser les limites de la créativité, dans l'esprit de la célébration du Canada et de ses provinces distinctes.
c6ef0575-eb0d-4796-ad7a-953ffbce2ebb.instructions: Redemption is as simple as presenting the e-gift card after a meal – either in print or on a mobile phone.Il vous suffit de présenter la carte-cadeau électronique après un repas - soit sur papier soit sur un téléphone mobile.

30061891-add7-4686-8e12-5ca8896cf49a.name: Oliver & Bonacini - Jump
30061891-add7-4686-8e12-5ca8896cf49a.description: Jump is a cornerstone of the culinary circuit, combining full-bodied food, a sleek design and an intoxicating energy. Jump’s legendary sky-high glass atrium, hidden-gem courtyard patio and bustling wrap-around bar serve as the perfect backdrop for our honest, fresh and flavourful cuisine and robust selection of spirit-forward cocktails. A timeless Toronto treasure, Jump owns an unparalleled commitment to quality.Jump est la pierre angulaire du circuit culinaire, combinant une nourriture généreuse, un design élégant et une énergie grisante. Le haut atrium en verre légendaire de Jump, la perle cachée de la terrasse dans la cour et le bar enveloppant animé constituent la toile de fond parfaite pour notre cuisine honnête, fraîche et savoureuse et notre vaste sélection de cocktails à base de spiritueux. Trésor intemporel de Toronto, Jump détient un engagement inégalé envers la qualité.

cae81d91-1f8d-4b1a-ba78-df9324aebe30.name: Oliver & Bonacini - Lena
cae81d91-1f8d-4b1a-ba78-df9324aebe30.description: A Chef Anthony Walsh creation, Leña pays homage to his Argentinian mother-in-law, Elena, from whom he has drawn great culinary inspiration, and embodies what he experiences in her kitchen – a passionate food philosophy that brings people together. Imaginative yet rooted in tradition, Leña’s cuisine showcases the vibrant essence of South American cooking, with unique Spanish and Italian influences.Création du chef Anthony Walsh, Leña rend hommage à sa belle-mère argentine, Elena, dont la cuisine l'a beaucoup inspiré, et représente ce qu'il vit dans sa cuisine : une philosophie culinaire empreinte de passion qui rassemble les gens. Imaginative tout en restant ancrée dans la tradition, la cuisine de Leña met en valeur l'essence éclatante de la cuisine sud-américaine, avec des influences espagnoles et italiennes uniques.

0d8e7277-5e3c-4331-a316-2ee3cff8fca5.name: Oliver & Bonacini - Luma
0d8e7277-5e3c-4331-a316-2ee3cff8fca5.description: Luma is a contemporary restaurant with an innovative seafood-driven menu, hand-crafted cocktails, and a robust wine list. Globally inspired and locally sourced, Chef Michael Wilson’s menu showcases a diverse range of fresh fish and seafood, quality meats, and seasonal vegetables. Warm and inviting, the dining room and bar are designed with rich woods, leather and stone, and the cozy lounge is filled with plush sofas and eye-catching artwork. Luma’s second floor location in the TIFF Bell Lightbox and its floor-to-ceiling windows offer outstanding views of King Street West and the downtown action.Luma est un restaurant contemporain qui propose un menu innovant à base de fruits de mer, des cocktails artisanaux et une vaste carte des vins. D'inspiration mondiale et d'origine locale, le menu du chef Michael Wilson présente une gamme variée de poissons et de fruits de mer frais, de viandes de qualité et de légumes de saison. Chaleureux et accueillants, la salle à manger et le bar sont conçus avec des boiseries, du cuir et de la pierre, et le salon confortable est rempli de canapés moelleux et d'œuvres d'art accrocheuses. L'emplacement du Luma au deuxième étage du Bell Lightbox du Festiva

01c3cf1b-ec4d-4ceb-a69c-8637290cde77.description: Maison Selby celebrates timeless French cooking with a modern accent. Boasting an impressive list of hand-crafted cocktails, our bar program is second-to-none. Largely inspired by the bistro and café genre, our menus showcase many dishes that creatively integrate traditional European techniques. Our breakfast and weekend brunch feature a thoughtfully curated selection of pastries and savoury dishes, while our lunch and dinner menus offer sensible yet delicious bistro fare with familiar French favourites like Tuna Niçoise Salad and Coq au Vin.-----Maison Selby célèbre la cuisine française intemporelle avec un accent moderne. Avec une liste impressionnante de cocktails faits à la main, notre programme de bar est inégalé. Largement inspirés des bistrots et des cafés, nos menus présentent de nombreux plats qui intègrent de manière créative les techniques européennes traditionnelles. Le petit-déjeuner et le brunch du week-end proposent une sélection bien pensée de pâtisseries et de plats salés, tandis que les menus du déjeuner et du dîner offrent une cuisine de bistrot à la fois raisonnable et délicieuse, avec des plats français familiers comme la salade de thon niçoise et le coq au vin

345783b6-8814-4e09-a148-4741016e5e50.name: Oliver & Bonacini - R&D
345783b6-8814-4e09-a148-4741016e5e50.description: R&D is a bold and modern Canadian Asian restaurant in the heart of Toronto’s iconic Chinatown. Owned and operated by Eric Chong, Season 1 winner of CTV’s MasterChef Canada, and his mentor, Michelin-starred Chef Alvin Leung, the menu combines traditional Asian flavours with Canadian favourites into bold, vibrant dishes.R&D est un restaurant asiatique canadien audacieux et moderne au cœur du quartier chinois emblématique de Toronto. Le restaurant est détenu et exploité par Eric Chong, vainqueur de la saison 1 de MasterChef Canada sur CTV, et son mentor, le chef Alvin Leung, étoilé par le Michelin. Le menu associe les saveurs asiatiques traditionnelles aux plats favoris canadiens pour proposer des mets audacieux et vibrants.

7ff32e54-9f85-4752-84aa-295536e3cc5c.name: Oliver & Bonacini - The Guild
7ff32e54-9f85-4752-84aa-295536e3cc5c.description: Located in the historic Hudson’s Bay building in downtown Calgary, The Guild Restaurant features the finest traditions of butchery, cookery and bar-keeping. Spanning two floors and featuring one of Calgary’s largest patios, The Guild is a nod to the guildhalls of the past, which served as meeting places for artists and merchants. Honouring local beef, game and fowl, and utilizing traditional cooking techniques over wood and coal, The Guild chefs are preparing a fitting homage to proud Canadian carnivores.Situé dans le bâtiment historique de la baie d'Hudson, au centre-ville de Calgary, le restaurant The Guild propose les meilleures traditions en matière de boucherie, de cuisine et de bar. Réparti sur deux étages et doté de l'un des plus grands patios de Calgary, The Guild est un clin d'œil aux halls de guilde du passé, qui servaient de lieux de rencontre pour les artistes et les marchands. Honorant le bœuf, le gibier et la volaille locaux et utilisant des techniques de cuisson traditionnelles sur bois et charbon, les chefs de The Guild préparent un hommage approprié aux fiers carnivores canadiens.

27dc937c-0bf6-49f3-9c67-d9f97d769f58.description: P.C. Richard & Son began as a small hardware store in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn in 1909, founded by Dutch immigrant, Peter Christian Richard. Richard & Son, from major appliances and consumer electronics, including Refrigerators, Washers & Dryers, 4K UHD TV's, HDTV’s, Digital Cameras, Computers, iPads, tablets, Video Games...and now mattresses!All of P.C. Richard & Son's nearly 2,827 employees are dedicated to providing Superior Service Before, During and After

497ab9eb-89dd-4668-94e9-3730bd5db401.description: Our first bakery-cafe opened in 1987, founded with a secret sourdough starter and the belief that the best part of bread is sharing it. Each recipe is filled with ingredients we feel good about and none of those we don’t because we are committed to serving our guests food that feels good in the moment and long after. While our company is now nearly 2,200 bakery-cafes strong, our values and belief in the lasting power of a great meal remain as strong as ever. We spend each day filling bellies, building empowered teams and inspiring communities. Nothing beats breaking bread together.

About Harvey'sHarvey's burgers are charbroiled to perfection, where each customer gets to choose from a selection of fresh toppings to build their perfect burger. It's a beautiful thing, but Harvey's isn't just about burgers. Choose from flame-broiled chicken, hot dogs, poutine, fries and onion rings, or even try a deep-fried pickle on the side. For over 60 years, Harvey's restaurants have been Canadian owned and operated, serving great tasting burgers at hundreds of locations

2237f187-103d-4c2a-abc2-963f60c4fdc5.name: Recipe Unlimited - Ultimate Dining Card
2237f187-103d-4c2a-abc2-963f60c4fdc5.description:
The Ultimate Dining eGift Card
Breakfast, lunch and dinner combinations are endless with The Ultimate Dining Card. Loaded with more than a dozen popular restaurant brands like Swiss Chalet, Montana's, East Side Mario's, Kelseys and more, the Ultimate Dining Card lets friends and family celebrate, whatever the reason.
This eGift Card gives access to a variety of menus and dining styles, allowing Canadians to dine in-person for a warm and friendly atmosphere, order online for a comfortable meal at home, or grab take-out when they're on the go. The Ultimate Dining Card is accepted at more than a dozen of Canada's most popular restaurant chains, with thousands of locations across Canada. Visit www.theultimatediningcard.ca to find out more.
This card can only be used in Canada. It can take up to 48 hours from the time of purchase to review and process your order. Please visit our eGift FAQs for further info.
About The Ultimate Dining Card
The Ultimate Dining Card is issued by the Recipe Unlimited Corporation (formerly Cara Operations Limited), one of Canada's oldest and largest restaurant companies. Founded in 1883 as The Canada Railway News Company, and offering newspapers and snacks t
2237f187-103d-4c2a-abc2-963f60c4fdc5.instructions:
Redeem an Ultimate Dining eGift
This Ultimate Dining eGift Card is redeemable for food and beverages at participating locations of Recipe Unlimited's restaurant brands in Canada. It can also be used online for some of their restaurant brands, but please check that brand's own website for info about online ordering. Each time you use this eGift, the amount of your purchase will be deducted from the remaining balance until it reaches zero, with any excess purchase price still payable using another payment method at the time of purchase.
In-Person Redemption
To redeem this eGift Card in-person, print it out at home first, or display it on your smartphone, then show the eGift Card to your server or the cashier when paying your bill, ensuring that the card number and PIN code (if required) are clearly visible.
Online Redemption
This eGift Card can be used to order online from some of the brands available on the Ultimate Dining Card, such as Swiss Chalet. Please check each brand's own website for further info, as online ordering isn't available for every brand on the card. During online check-out, enter the card number and PIN code (if required), making sure there are no spaces in the card number or PIN code when you type them in, then apply the card to your purchase.

d74a1d21-4701-4a55-af92-5cfaccd667cd.name: Record Tokens
d74a1d21-4701-4a55-af92-5cfaccd667cd.description: Record Tokens are the perfect gift for any occasion. From birthdays to Christmas – Record Tokens are a special treat for those life-long music lovers as well as a wonderful gift for those yet to experience buying their first vinyl record.Our gift cards are available to redeem in independent record stores across the UK with a huge selection of vinyl records and CDs to choose from. It’s the perfect opportunity to experience the unique culture of the UK’s independent record stores and discover the records needed to complete any music lover’s collection.

bbb71348-f61f-42ac-9a63-f2b6cfdd1e34.name: Red Letter Days
bbb71348-f61f-42ac-9a63-f2b6cfdd1e34.description:
Set up in 1989, Red Letter Days pioneered the concept of giving unforgettable experiences as gifts. Red Letter Days today, with its iconic red box, is THE go-to gift experience company.
Making memories is at our core and we give our customers an unrivalled choice with something to suit every taste, occasion and budget. From relaxing spa escapes to once-in-a-lifetime moments like a Spitfire Passenger Flight.We’re passionate about creating memories and continue to build on our love for adventure and expertise.*Please note that e-gift cards cannot be used alongside discount codes or to purchase tangible gifts such as hampers. Products will appear at their full price when the gift card is redeemed.

916c35fa-a15f-4e76-8f40-83febcff3224.name: Red Lobster Canada
916c35fa-a15f-4e76-8f40-83febcff3224.description:
ed Lobster eGift Card
The Red Lobster eGift Card is the perfect gift for the seafood lover in your life, where they can enjoy their world-famous lobster, scallop, shrimp and crab dishes, as well as choose from their popular side dishes and starters, including their Cheddar Bay biscuits and popcorn shrimp. Why not make tonight a Red Lobster night?
This card can only be used in Canada. It can take up to 48 hours from the time of purchase to review and process your order. Please visit our eGift FAQs for further info.
About Red Lobster
From their beginnings in 1968 as a single, family-owned restaurant in Lakeland, Florida, Red Lobster has grown into a widespread seafood restaurant chain with hundreds of locations across Canada, the USA, Asia and the Middle East. Red Lobster is committed to giving its customers a unique and unparalleled seafood experience not found anywhere else, where they celebrate seafood, not just with the meals they serve, but with how they source their fish and shellfish too. The first Canadian Red Lobster location opened in 1983 after the expansion of Red Lobster across the United States in the 1970s. With each step, they've introduced new tastes to their diners,

Red Robin eGift Card
Give the gift of crave-able, high-quality gourmet burgers with the Red Robin eGift Card, where they can also enjoy bottomless Steak Fries, sandwiches, delicious brews and a warm, welcoming atmosphere. Red Robin is always a hit with diners of all ages.
This card can only be used in Canada. It can take up to 48 hours from the time of purchase to review and process your order. Please visit our eGift FAQs for further info.
About Red Robin Restaurants
Red Robin's gourmet burgers and brews started over 50 years ago at the corner of Furhman and Eastlake Avenues in Seattle, originally called Sam's Tavern. The owner was Sam, and he sang in a barbershop quartet, and while singing his favourite song When the Red Red Robin, Sam decided to change the name of the restaurant to Sam's Red Robin. It wasn't long before the business started to grow, and in 1969 it became a popular local hotspot for university students looking for a drink and a bite to eat. First expanding to Portland, Oregon, over the next few decades Red Robin migrated steadily across the North America. From these beginnings, Red Robin has grown into a casual dining restaurant chain famous for a wide selection o

82688742-4728-42c8-a5db-0aa18cc6a81e.description:
At Recreational Equipment, Inc. (REI) we believe a life outdoors is a life well-lived!
We believe that it’s in the wild, untamed and natural places that we find our best selves, so our purpose is to awaken a lifelong love of the outdoors, for all.
Since 1938, we have been your local outdoor co-op, working to help you experience the transformational power of nature. We bring you top-quality gear and apparel, expert advice, rental equipment, inspiring stories of life outside and outdoor experiences to enjoy alone or share with your friends and family. And because we have no shareholders, with every purchase you make with REI, you are choosing to steward the outdoors, support sustainable business and help the fight for life outside.

279aa9a8-6f8c-461c-a018-fcd49b478720.name: Rubio's Coastal Grill
279aa9a8-6f8c-461c-a018-fcd49b478720.description: At Rubio’s, we believe some of the best gifts come wrapped in tortillas. Whether it’s a birthday, a holiday, or just because, show your favorite people you’re thinking of them by treating them to lunch or dinner, with a Rubio’s Gift Card. A meal at Rubio’s delivers coastal-inspired fare in a casual, relaxing setting. We have a simple, but deliberate approach: pair unique recipes with quality ingredients like grilled-to-order responsibly-sourced shrimp, Wild Alaska Coho Salmon, all natural chicken and Wild Mahi Mahi. With options ranging from our award-winning signature tacos and burritos to flavorful salads and bowls our menu has something for every coastal mood. For a coastal take on gift-giving, pick up a Rubio’s Gift Card today.

e2c92233-ac74-4d7e-86ee-da8226e78940.description:
Duke's Refresher + Bar eGift Card
For friends and family who love quality beer and cocktails, served alongside delicious food, the Duke's Refresher + Bar card is the perfect gift. Duke's has a unique atmosphere, awesome food and talented bar staff, all ready to help make this a gift they'll remember for a long time.
This card can only be used in Canada. It can take up to 48 hours from the time of purchase to review and process your order. Please visit our eGift FAQs for further info.
About Duke's Refresher + Bar
Duke's Refresher + Bar serves up more than 40 glorious beers on tap, mouth-watering dishes, fun weekly events, and a staff like no other in the city. At Duke's, the music's loud, the conversation can get out of hand and guests are treated like regulars the minute they walk in the door. Brunch at Duke's means classic breakfasts like their berry tipsy waffles or new takes like the brunch burger or chicken and waffles, or hang around for lunch and munch on burgers, sandwiches, tacos and poutine, or meet up with the gang for dinner and share crispy Korean fried chicken, guacamole, wings, sliders and epic calamari.

Redeem a Duke's Refresher + Bar eGift Card
This eGift Card is redeemable in-person at participating Duke's Refresher + Bar locations in Canada. As this eGift is also an Inspired Dining Card it can also be used at participating SIR Corp restaurants in Canada, which include Jack Astors, Scaddabush Italian Kitchen + Bar, The Loose Moose and REDS Restaurants. Each time you use this eGift, the amount of your purchase will be deducted from the remaining balance until it reaches zero, with any excess purchase price still payable using another method of payment at the time of purchase.
In-Person Redemption ONLY
To redeem this eGift, print it out at home first, or display it on your smartphone, then show it to your server or the cashier when paying your bill, ensuring that the card number and PIN code (if required) are clearly visible.

About Jack Astor's Bar and Grill
Since their first location opened in St. Catharines, Ontario back in 1990, Jack Astor's has been striving for an over-easy atmosphere in their dozens of locations across Canada. Their mission has always been to help people have a blast while enjoying amazing food. Jack Astors takes pride in their food, making their recipes in-house, from fresh guacamole to centre-cut, aged AAA striploin. A pitcher perfect marriage!Brasserie moderne et barbecue, Liberty Commons honore l'histoire et le tumulte du quartier, et célèbre l'union de la bonne nourriture et de la bonne bière en bonne compagnie. To receive SMS and Email alert, SmartGuard user needs to provide an alternate mobile number and an Email address during the registration process.

• User can erase the data from the device
• Disable PC Connection with the user's device
• Silently capture pictures from the front and back camera
• Lock the user's device
• Prevents switching off user's phone
• Make your phone ring even if it’s on silent or vibration modeSmart Guard has three basic features:
• Anti

9b278ba9-63f8-4412-81b8-0ffe20ae86d1.name: Steak 'n Shake
9b278ba9-63f8-4412-81b8-0ffe20ae86d1.description: For over 85 years, the company’s name has been symbolic of its heritage. The word “steak” stood for STEAKBURGER. The term “shake” stood for hand-dipped MILK SHAKES. Gus was determined to serve his customers the finest burgers and shakes in the business. To prove his point that his burgers were exceptionally prime, he would wheel in a barrel of steaks (including round, sirloin, and T-bones) and grind the meat into burgers right in front of the guests. Hence arose the origin of our famous slogan, “In Sight It Must Be Right.”

ed831829-8393-41c2-b954-a170768531f2.description: Experience a taste of the extraordinary.For over 100 years, Stock Yards has offered the highest grades of meat available - USDA Prime and USDA Choice, as well as the Certified Angus Beef® Brand,* giving you the widest possible selection of only the very finest beef.We only select from Midwestern corn-fed stock. All of our steaks are hand trimmed by the same master butcher who supplies our fine restaurant customers, to deliver only the most juicy, tender and flavorful steak experience. Our steaks are then expertly aged to maximize tenderness and flavor. Our wet-aging process allows beef to develop that extraordinary richness and tenderness our customers keep coming back for year after year. Our dry-aging produces a deeper, almost "woodsy" flavor sought by many beef connoisseurs.Stock Yards beef matures under ultraviolet light in a controlled airflow environment to impart the richest flavor. We carefully inspect each and every steak to ensure you get only the best. We'd have it no other way. This gift card can also be redeemed at any of 1800Flowers.com nine brands.

95ff5876-88f5-4ffd-9356-f0400a831a27.description: The Nature Conservancy is the leading conservation organization working around the world to protect ecologically important lands and waters for nature and people. Specifically, the Conservancy has protected more than 119 million acres of land and thousands of miles of rivers worldwide, works in 69 countries protecting habitats from grasslands to coral reefs, and addresses threats to conservation involving climate change, fresh water, oceans and conservation lands.Visit nature.org to learn more.

bee36391-7485-4d3e-be31-9a7ffacbcb0c.name: Toby Carvery
bee36391-7485-4d3e-be31-9a7ffacbcb0c.description: Here at Toby, we believe there's only one way to do our beloved Great British roast - and that's properly.Every day, your local Toby Carvery lays on a family-sized feast of tender, slow-cooked meats, eight lots of veg including crispy, ruffled roasties and all the trimmings. So you can enjoy your favourite carvery meal just the way you like it, whenever you like it. You'll find lots more on offer, such as tasty specials, all-you-can-eat breakfasts and even comfy accommodation at some of our restaurants. Every spud is checked by hand and ruffled for extra crunch. All of our meat is slow-cooked and basted to succulent perfection. And our Yorkshires are freshly made in our kitchens and served crisp, fluffy and piping-hot to your plate. That's what makes us the home of the roast.
