Redeem (use) online only at: https://tripgift.com
4d43c676-8ad6-4bfa-82d5-8e77732889cf.instructions:
To redeem your TripGift UK gift card, follow these simple steps:1. **Visit the TripGift Website**: Go to the official TripGift website or open the TripGift app on your device.
2. **Sign in/Create an Account**: Log in to your existing account or create a new one if you don't have one.
3. **Select ‘Redeem Gift Card’**: Navigate to the gift card redemption section on the website or app.
4. **Enter Gift Card Code**: Input your unique gift card code in the designated field.
5. **Confirm and Apply**: Click ‘Redeem’ to apply the balance to your account.
6. **Start Booking**: Browse available travel options and enjoy your journey!**Limitations**: Please note that this gift card cannot be used for subscription services.

19ba694b-0b8e-47d8-b7b8-02493e4192c3.name: Unicef
19ba694b-0b8e-47d8-b7b8-02493e4192c3.description: The United Nations Children's Fund (UNICEF) works in more than 190 countries and territories to put children first. UNICEF has helped save more children's lives than any other humanitarian organization, by providing health care and immunizations, clean water and sanitation, nutrition, education, emergency relief and more. UNICEF USA supports UNICEF's work through fundraising, advocacy and education in the United States. Together, we are working toward the day when no children die from preventable causes and every child has a safe and healthy childhood.Visit unicefusa.org to learn more.
19ba694b-0b8e-47d8-b7b8-02493e4192c3.instructions: Redemption Instructions1. Go to charityontop.org2. Select REDEEM3. Enter your card number4. Search for 'UNICEF USA' under organization name

7e09a136-b611-4edb-93d5-052057852277.name: Unnaaty
7e09a136-b611-4edb-93d5-052057852277.description: At Unnaaty we understand the difficulty of purchasing the perfect gift for someone.So, why not gift one of Unnaaty's e-gift cards that will allow the recepient to treat themselves to the things they love and also give them an opportunity to support the value creating brands that we stock.Our gift cards are digital and so can easily be redeemed online without having to ship, reducing your carbon footprint and overall positively contributing to a more ethical life.Since these gift cards do not come with an expiry date, the receiver has the choice of using them whenever they want. These cards also let the receiver have the flexibility of using the entire gift amount against one order or over multiple orders, provided there is still a balance remaining on the card.
7e09a136-b611-4edb-93d5-052057852277.instructions: An e-gift card once received it can be redeemed at checkout by entering the 16 digit code in the box (Gift card or discount code). Once you have entered the code in the box please press the arrow/apply button. The gift card codes aren't case sensitive. The balance on a gift card can be spent on more than one order. Gift card balances are applied to the total value of an order, which can include taxes and shipping. Once you redeem a gift card, the checkout will display one of the following options:- If the balance available on the gift card is greater than or equal to the order total, then you can click Complete order.- If the balance available on the gift card is less than the order total, then you will be prompted to choose a second payment method for the balance before placing the order.

4759116e-ae65-49b9-82af-b0825cfec9f5.name: UNO Pizzeria & Grill
4759116e-ae65-49b9-82af-b0825cfec9f5.description: Sit down to a meal theway Chicago intended it–big,bold,and jam-packed with the kind of flavor you only get from doing things right. At UNO’s, we make our dough fresh every day and let it rise for at least 24 hours. Our toppings are hand-chopped. The crust for each pizza is hand-stretched. And our craft brews are local and rotated often. Because we do it with craft, or not at all. See, back in 1943, we were the guys that went deep when the pizza world was still seeing nothing but flat. We made doughwith a tall edge, topped with homemade sauceand more cheese than you could believe.That’s Chicago deep dish pizza, and we invented it. Our Chicago thin crust comes with a deep-dish attitude too. In fact, we have a whole menu of apps, entrées, and desserts so chalk-full of flavor we’ll have your taste buds screaming uncle. Craft is what we know –the same thing we’ve been serving ever since. We’re keeping the taps flowing and the pizza coming!At UNO’s, in craft we trust.
4759116e-ae65-49b9-82af-b0825cfec9f5.instructions: In Restaurant:Print this page or present your eGift Card on mobile phone.Online:Simply go to www.unos.comto place your order. When requested for payment at checkout, select Gift Card as the payment type and enter the 16-digit card number when prompted.

e051dee9-e907-480d-b2b8-de80e52c23c5.name: UNTUCKit
e051dee9-e907-480d-b2b8-de80e52c23c5.description: Created in 2011, UNTUCKit has given men a seamless way to look sharp and feel casual by creating shirts designed specifically to be worn untucked. The brand has since expanded to offer fit combinations for all shapes and sizes, as well as new product categories like polos, tees, Henleys, pants, sweaters, jackets, and sport coats. It also offers a wide selection of shirts, dresses, and blazers for women. UNTUCKit is dedicated to creating an unmatched shopping experience with more than 80 physical retail locations across the US, Canada, and the UK. For more information, visit UNTUCKit.com.
e051dee9-e907-480d-b2b8-de80e52c23c5.instructions: UNTUCKit Gift Cards can be redeemed in the United States only for authorized goods at UNTUCKit by entering your gift card information at checkout. UNTUCKit Gift Cards may also be redeemed at participating UNTUCKit retail stores.

ba4dbbd4-3c0a-4709-bcad-e175d12ab1ae.description: When you're exploring the great British countryside, you're never far from a bright and welcoming country pub and dining. To enjoy a fabulous meal with glorious scenery and rural charm, take your pick from nearly 200 Vintage Inns. Discover new beers and imaginative foods, or linger over a lazy lunch or an endless evening with friends. With grassy gardens outside and roaring log fires inside, this is the place to share the best of the season. Some even have cosy B&B rooms.

e8c257ee-461b-415f-8020-410c2f05ec6b.name: Virgin Experience Days
e8c257ee-461b-415f-8020-410c2f05ec6b.description: A Virgin Experience Days Gift Card is a gift card to spend at Virgin Experience Days: as straightforward as it gets. Grab a card then head to the Virgin Experience Days website to take your pick – from thrilling supercar drives to soothing spa days, with one of these there’s a world of potential at your fingertips. All you need to decide is what experience you want to do!

Any remaining balance on your card can be used towards future purchases.

e13db392-7772-448a-be8e-ea013276dd59.name: Virgin Experience Gifts
e13db392-7772-448a-be8e-ea013276dd59.description: Give the gift of a trip and experience of a lifetime with Virgin Experience Gifts eGift Cards from Giftcardmall.com. Whether your recipient wants to visit every national park in America, cruise the Bahamas or even race a Lamborghini down a racetrack straightaway, there is an experience for everyone on your shopping list.Each Virgin Experience Gifts eGift Card can be sent via email and redeemed online to book the experience of choice. No matter what the occasion, adventurers and experience-seekers will be sure to love the gift of a Virgin Experience Gifts eGift.

It’s what drives us to deliver joyful experiences for everyone involved, from the winemakers in the vineyard to the wine lovers at home.Since launching in 2000, we’ve sold over 100 million bottles to customers across the UK, offering wines for every taste and occasion. We work closely with talented independent winemakers around the world to create and source exclusive wines that are a joy to drink. With over 90% of our wines being exclusive to us, we’re proud to be on a mission to become the UK’s most rewarding, feel-good wine retailer.

e0927076-ac17-4de2-80a8-c846e0e441a0.instructions:
In-Store Mobile Redemption Instructions
Recipient:
To redeem your eGift Card from a mobile device display the barcode, gift card number and associated PIN (if applicable) to the cashier at the time of purchase.Cashier:
Scan the barcode from the mobile device and/or hand key the gift card number and associated PIN (if applicable) into the POS.Where can I use my Card?
You can use your Card exclusively at any Walgreens or Duane Reade location to purchase merchandise and services. Walgreens Gift Cards can be used at pharmacy counters, photo kiosks and online at Walgreens.com.
To make purchases online at Walgreens.com
1. During the checkout process select “Use Walgreens Gift Card”
2. Enter your 19-digit Walgreens card number
3. Enter the 3-digit CVV
4. Enter the amount that you want to apply to your purchase
5. Funds will be held on the card until your order ships or is picked up in-store.
To make purchases at a Walgreens Store
Open the secure link from the email you received to display your gift card on your mobile device. You may also print your card and present it at the time of payment. The cashier will scan the barcode. As you use your Card, the balance is reduced by the full amount of each purchase including taxes, charges, and other fees, if any. You can use your Card to pay the full amount of the purchase and applicable taxes if the balance on the Card is sufficient. You can also make a purchase for an amount greater than the remaining balance by using two payment methods.

In-Store Redemption
Print out the eGift Card at home first, or display it on your smartphone, then show it to the cashier or sales associate when you go to pay for your purchases, making sure that the card number and PIN code (if required) are clearly visible. Online Redemption
